ALLUSERSPROFILE: Path to the All Users profile folder (typically C:\ProgramData).
APPDATA: Path to the roaming application data folder for the current user.
ChocolateyInstall: Root directory of the Chocolatey package manager installation.
ChocolateyLastPathUpdate: Timestamp of the last Chocolatey PATH modification.
ChocolateyToolsLocation: Directory where Chocolatey installs shim-based tools.
CLASSPATH: Directories and JARs searched by the Java class loader.
CLINK_DIR: Installation directory of Clink (Readline for cmd.exe).
CLINK_SETTINGS: Directory containing Clink settings and configuration files.
COLUMNS: Number of columns in the terminal window.
COMMANDER_DRIVE: Drive letter used by Total Commander.
CommonProgramFiles: Path to the Common Files folder under Program Files.
CommonProgramFiles(x86): Path to the Common Files folder under Program Files (x86).
CommonProgramW6432: Path to the native Common Files folder on 64-bit Windows.
COMPUTERNAME: NetBIOS name of the local computer.
ComSpec: Full path to the command interpreter (usually cmd.exe).
CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV: Name of the currently active Conda environment.
CONDA_PREFIX: Root directory of the active Conda environment.
CONDA_PYTHON_EXE: Path to the Python executable inside the Conda installation.
CUDA_PATH: Root directory of the NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit installation.
CUDA_PATH_V12_0: Root directory of CUDA Toolkit version 12.0.
DENO_DIR: Cache directory for Deno modules and compiled scripts.
DENO_INSTALL: Installation directory of the Deno runtime.
DOCKER_HOST: URL of the Docker daemon socket or TCP endpoint.
DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT: Disables .NET CLI telemetry when set to 1 or true.
DOTNET_ROOT: Root directory of the .NET SDK installation.
DriverData: Path to the system driver data directory.
EXE4J_JAVA_HOME: Java home directory used by exe4j-wrapped applications.
FPS_BROWSER_APP_PROFILE_STRING: Browser app profile identifier for Microsoft Edge.
FPS_BROWSER_USER_PROFILE_STRING: Browser user profile identifier for Microsoft Edge.
GIT_SSH: Path to the SSH client used by Git for remote operations.
GOPATH: Workspace directory for Go modules and compiled packages.
GOROOT: Root directory of the Go SDK installation.
GRADLE_HOME: Root directory of the Gradle build tool installation.
HOME: Home directory of the current user (Unix-style, used by some tools).
HOMEDRIVE: Drive letter of the current user's home directory.
HOMEPATH: Path (without drive letter) to the current user's home directory.
JAVA_HOME: Root directory of the Java Development Kit (JDK) installation.
JRE_HOME: Root directory of the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) installation.
LANG: Default locale and character encoding (e.g. en_US.UTF-8).
LINES: Number of lines in the terminal window.
LOCALAPPDATA: Path to the local (non-roaming) application data folder.
LOGONSERVER: UNC name of the domain controller that authenticated the user.
M2_HOME: Root directory of the Apache Maven installation.
MAVEN_HOME: Root directory of the Apache Maven installation.
MSBuildExtensionsPath: Path to the MSBuild extensions directory.
MSBuildExtensionsPath32: Path to the 32-bit MSBuild extensions directory.
MSBuildSDKsPath: Path to the directory containing MSBuild SDKs.
NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS: Path to a PEM file with additional trusted CA certificates for Node.js.
NODE_OPTIONS: Default command-line options passed to the Node.js runtime.
NODE_PATH: Additional directories searched for Node.js modules.
NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX: Global installation prefix for npm packages.
NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS: Number of logical processors available to the system.
NVM_HOME: Installation directory of Node Version Manager (NVM) for Windows.
NVM_SYMLINK: Symlink path pointing to the active Node.js version managed by NVM.
OneDrive: Path to the user's OneDrive sync folder.
OneDriveCommercial: Path to the user's OneDrive for Business sync folder.
OneDriveConsumer: Path to the user's personal OneDrive sync folder.
OPENSSL_CONF: Path to the OpenSSL configuration file.
PATH: Directories searched for executables when running commands.
PNPM_HOME: Global store directory for the pnpm package manager.
POSH_GIT_ENABLED: Enables posh-git integration in Oh My Posh prompts.
POSH_INSTALLER: Installation method used for Oh My Posh (e.g. winget, scoop).
POSH_THEMES_PATH: Directory containing Oh My Posh theme files.
POWERSHELL_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL: Identifies the PowerShell distribution channel for telemetry.
PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE: Processor architecture of the current process (AMD64, x86, ARM64).
ProgramData: Path to the ProgramData directory (shared application data).
ProgramFiles: Path to the Program Files directory.
ProgramFiles(x86): Path to the Program Files (x86) directory on 64-bit Windows.
ProgramW6432: Path to the native Program Files directory on 64-bit Windows.
PROMPT: Command prompt format string for cmd.exe.
PUBLIC: Path to the shared Public user profile folder.
PYENV: Root directory of the pyenv Python version manager.
PYENV_HOME: Root directory of the pyenv-win installation.
PYENV_ROOT: Root directory of the pyenv installation (Unix-style).
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE: Prevents Python from writing .pyc bytecode files when set to 1.
PYTHONHOME: Root directory of the Python installation (overrides default prefix).
PYTHONPATH: Additional directories searched for Python module imports.
PYTHONUNBUFFERED: Forces unbuffered stdout and stderr in Python when set to 1.
QT_ACCESSIBILITY: Enables the Qt accessibility bridge. Set to 1 to activate.
QT_PATH: Root directory of the Qt framework installation.
QT_PLUGIN_PATH: Additional directories searched for Qt plugins.
CARGO_HOME: Root directory of the Rust Cargo package manager.
RUSTUP_HOME: Root directory of the rustup toolchain manager.
RUBY_HOME: Root directory of the Ruby installation.
GEM_HOME: Directory where Ruby gems are installed.
GEM_PATH: Directories searched for installed Ruby gems.
SCOOP: Root directory of the Scoop package manager installation.
SESSIONNAME: Name of the current session (Console for local, RDP-Tcp# for remote).
SystemDrive: Drive letter of the system partition (usually C:).
SystemRoot: Path to the Windows system root directory (usually C:\Windows).
TEMP: Path to the temporary files directory for the current user.
TERM: Terminal type identifier (used by Unix tools on Windows).
TERM_PROGRAM: Name of the terminal emulator application.
TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION: Version string of the terminal emulator.
TMP: Path to the temporary files directory (alias for TEMP).
USERDNSDOMAIN: DNS domain name of the user's domain.
USERDOMAIN: NetBIOS name of the domain the user belongs to.
USERDOMAIN_ROAMINGPROFILE: Domain associated with the user's roaming profile.
USERNAME: Login name of the current user.
USERPROFILE: Path to the current user's profile directory.
UV_LINK_MODE: Controls how uv links packages (copy, hardlink, symlink).
VIRTUAL_ENV: Path to the currently active Python virtual environment.
VIRTUAL_ENV_PROMPT: Custom prompt prefix for the active Python virtual environment.
VCINSTALLDIR: Path to the Visual C++ installation directory.
VS170COMNTOOLS: Path to the Visual Studio 2022 common tools directory.
VSAPPIDDIR: Path to the Visual Studio application ID directory.
VSCMD_ARG_HOST_ARCH: Host architecture for Visual Studio Developer Command Prompt.
VSCMD_ARG_TGT_ARCH: Target architecture for Visual Studio Developer Command Prompt.
VSCODE_GIT_ASKPASS_EXTRA_ARGS: Extra arguments passed to VS Code's Git credential helper.
VSCODE_GIT_ASKPASS_MAIN: Path to VS Code's Git credential askpass script.
VSCODE_GIT_ASKPASS_NODE: Path to the Node.js binary used by VS Code's Git askpass.
VSCODE_GIT_IPC_HANDLE: IPC handle for VS Code Git integration.
WASI_SDK_PATH: Root directory of the WASI SDK for WebAssembly.
WASMTIME_HOME: Root directory of the Wasmtime WebAssembly runtime.
windir: Path to the Windows directory (usually C:\Windows).
WSLENV: Environment variables shared between Windows and WSL.
WT_PROFILE_ID: GUID of the active Windows Terminal profile.
WT_SESSION: GUID of the current Windows Terminal session.
ZES_ENABLE_SYSMAN: Enables Intel oneAPI Level Zero System Management. Set to 1 to activate.
